'''Voltare''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Voltare system/Legends|Voltare system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
